name: Verify Cloudflare edge proxy SERVICE_MAP origin routing
desc: Ensure SERVICE_MAP origins point to actual Cloud Run URLs, not self-referencing Cloudflare domains

name: Eliminate all fallback naming in provider configs
desc: Rename heady-cloud-fallback → heady-cloud-vertex, heady-local → heady-edge-local in all configs

name: Verify HEADY_URL env var across all shells and configs
desc: Confirm HEADY_URL=https://api.headysystems.com everywhere — zero localhost references

name: Validate auto-success engine full-throttle state
desc: Confirm auto-success engine is running with 16.18s interval, 13 tasks/batch, 135+ catalog

name: Verify all 7 public domains serving live pages
desc: Confirm headysystems.com, headyme.com, headymcp.com, headyio.com, headyconnection.org, headybuddy.org, headybot.com all return 200

name: Verify admin.headysystems.com Cloud Run root route
desc: Fix 404 on admin.headysystems.com by ensuring admin static files or redirect are served

name: Validate liquid provider naming consistency
desc: Ensure all provider names use liquid terminology (no fallback, no hierarchy) across conductor + orchestrator + edge proxy

name: Verify Cloud Run gateway health endpoint responds real data
desc: Confirm heady-edge-gateway Cloud Run service returns live JSON from /v1/health, not cached stubs

name: Deploy updated edge proxy with corrected SERVICE_MAP
desc: Deploy Cloudflare Worker with SERVICE_MAP pointing to Cloud Run origin via CI/CD

name: Validate Cloudflare API token permissions for wrangler deploy
desc: Ensure CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN has Workers write permissions for automated deployments

name: Verify all engines started in engine-wiring bootstrap
desc: Confirm AutoSuccess, Scientist, QA, RealtimeIntelligence, PatternEngine, SelfCritique all .start() called

name: Zero-localhost production audit sweep
desc: Scan entire codebase for any remaining 127.0.0.1 or localhost references in production paths
